description: Hierarchical clustering viewer that reads in Eisen's cdt, atr, and gtr files. A detailed description of these formats is available from http\://microarray.ccgb.umn.edu/smd/html/MicroArray/help/formats.shtml
author: Joshua Gould, Broad Institute
plan:
## JavaTreeView GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
JavaTreeView is a GenePattern module that Hierarchical clustering viewer that reads in Eisen's cdt, atr, and gtr files. A detailed description of these formats is available from http\://microarray.ccgb.umn.edu/smd/html/MicroArray/help/formats.shtml

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 3 parameters:
- Required: cdt.filename
- Optional: gtr.filename, atr.filename

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>TreeView.jar<path.separator><libdir>GIFEncoder.jar<path.separator><libdir>nanoxml-2.2.2.jar TreeView -f <cdt.filename> <gtr.filename> <atr.filename>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: cdt.filename
parameters.description: Clustered data table, contains the original data, but reordered

parameters.name: gtr.filename
parameters.description: Gene Tree file, records the order in which genes (rows) were joined (at least one of gtr filename and atr filename is required)

parameters.name: atr.filename
parameters.description: Array Tree file, records the order in which samples (columns) were joined (at least one of gtr filename and atr filename is required)
